market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for U.S. users
articles.description: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

articles.title: Senate leaders push for July passage of CLARITY Act
articles.description: Lawmakers in the US Senate are on state work periods until July 13, giving them only four weeks to address a cryptocurrency market structure bill before another break and possible delays due to campaigning for elections.

articles.title: Bitcoin put-call ratio hits 1-year high: Are bears preparing for drop to $55K?
articles.description: Rising demand for put options and persistent ETF outflows highlight Bitcoin's weakness despite lower oil prices.

articles.title: Watch out, Amazon: The Kobo eReader now has a Goodreads rival
articles.description: Kobo users can now automatically sync their reading progress to StoryGraph, making it easier to track books, reading stats, and challenges without relying on Amazon’s Goodreads.

articles.title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
articles.description: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

articles.title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
articles.description: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.

articles.title: Bitcoin lending is entering a new institutional era, according to Silicon Valley Bank
articles.description: The bank said bitcoin lending has emerged from the 2022 crypto credit collapse with stronger risk controls, growing institutional participation and a path toward lower borrowing costs.

articles.title: Bitcoin balances $60K tightrope as US stocks rebound on fresh Iran peace deal hopes
articles.description: Bitcoin faced its own battle for support as US stocks headed higher and analysts warned of a lack of "conviction" among BTC buyers.

articles.title: Coinbase, Kraken and OKX move to swoop up EU users affected by MiCA restrictions
articles.description: Several exchanges that have already been authorized by EU regulators are attempting to bring in users from companies unlicensed under the Markets in Crypto-Assets rules, offering transfer bonuses and prizes.

articles.title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
articles.description: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.

articles.title: JPMorgan urges strong safeguards as congress weighs crypto market structure rules
articles.description: The bank says Congress should pair regulatory clarity with safeguards as Senate negotiates the Clarity Act.

articles.title: Trump administration threatens 92 GW of new electricity supply with red tape
articles.description: The Trump administration's moves threaten $121 billion in new solar and wind power, two energy sources that are the biggest contributors to new capacity in the U.S.

articles.title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
articles.description: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.

articles.title: BNY adds USDC minting and redemption to institutional custody platform
articles.description: The move deepens BNY's partnership with Circle and builds on the bank's role as the primary custodian of USDC reserves.

articles.title: Private keys, not smart contracts, caused 40% of crypto's $16 billion hack losses. Here's whats being done.
articles.description: The industry is moving toward fixing the private key vulnerability issue, just not evenly, Wish Wu, co-founder and CEO of Pharos, said.

articles.title: White House to speak with law enforcement groups to push Crypto's Clarity Act
articles.description: Officials from the White House are said to be sitting down with law enforcement representatives who have objected to illicit-finance portions of the bill.

articles.title: J.P. Morgan broadens blockchain settlement network as banks modernize cross-border payments
articles.description: The bank added five Asia-Pacific currencies to its Kinexys blockchain platform, allowing institutional clients to settle payments and FX around the clock.

articles.title: Crypto analytics firm Chainalysis proposes standards for blockchain tracing
articles.description: The blockchain analysis company published a proposed ontology for how investigators can identify clusters of crypto addresses and link them together.

articles.title: MiCA's looming deadline could leave 10 million crypto users without a platform in the EU
articles.description: As MiCA takes full effect on July 1, SwissBorg's Alex Fazel told CoinDesk users should choose platforms built to withstand EU regulators' tightening oversight.

articles.title: Rocket Lab continues buying spree by acquiring satellite company Iridium
articles.description: The all-stock deal values Iridium at $8 billion and gives Rocket Lab even more firepower to compete against Amazon and SpaceX.
